boundHTS 1.0.2

    • Simulated zero inflated Beta distribution example

    Monte Carlo Convolution Density for Zero-One-Inflated Beta Distributions

    ZOIB_convolution_density_point.Rd

    Monte Carlo Convolution Density for Zero-One-Inflated Beta Distributions

    ZOIB_convolution_density_point(
  weighted_samps,
  alpha_point,
  beta_point,
  zoi_point,
  coi_point,
  weights,
  z_values
)

    Arguments

    weighted_samps

    Monte Carlo draws of weighted bottom-series samples (matrix: n_draws x n_nodes).

    alpha_point

    Point estimates of alpha (shape1) parameters for the Beta distribution for each observation.

    beta_point

    Point estimates of beta (shape2) parameters for the Beta distribution for each observation.

    zoi_point

    Zero-one inflation probability (vector: length n_nodes).

    coi_point

    Conditional one inflation probability (vector: length n_nodes).

    weights

    Node weights defining the aggregation structure (vector: length n_nodes).

    z_values

    Numeric vector of evaluation points for the aggregate density.

    Value

    A numeric vector containing the estimated aggregate density evaluated at z_values.

    Details

    This function computes a Monte Carlo approximation of the density of an aggregated Zero-One-Inflated Beta (ZOIB) distribution. Posterior draws are passed to dZOIB_4p(), which evaluates the ZOIB density for each Monte Carlo draw. The resulting density is normalised using numerical integration.

    Examples

    set.seed(1)

# Simulation setup
n_sims <- 10
n_draws <- 200
n_nodes <- 2

# Simulated data
 weighted_samps <- array(runif(n_sims * n_draws * n_nodes, min = 0, max = 0.2),
 dim = c(n_sims, n_draws, n_nodes))
alpha_point <- runif(n_nodes, 2, 5)
beta_point  <- runif(n_nodes, 2, 5)
zoi_point <- runif(n_nodes, 0, 0.2)
coi_point <- runif(n_nodes, 0, 0.2)

weights <- c(1, 1)
z_values <- seq(0, 2, length.out = 50)

dens <- ZOIB_convolution_density_point(
  weighted_samps = weighted_samps,
  alpha_point = alpha_point,
  beta_point = beta_point,
  zoi_point = zoi_point,
  coi_point = coi_point,
  weights = weights,
  z_values = z_values
)

head(dens)
#> [1] 0.4618095

    Contents

    Developed by Hannah Comiskey, David T. Frazier, Ole Maneesoonthorn.
